name: qualixar-os
description: The complete operating system for AI agents. Design multi-agent teams with Forge AI, browse a skill marketplace, monitor costs, run 13 execution topologies. Compatible with OpenClaw, NemoClaw, DeerFlow, LangChain, CrewAI.
author: Qualixar
features: Forge AI team designer — auto-designs agent teams from a prompt
13 execution topologies (sequential, parallel, debate, DAG, hybrid, etc.)
Cost routing with per-agent budget tracking
Claw Bridge — import OpenClaw, NemoClaw, DeerFlow agents
